rationale: The empty set omits both constituents: a sentence is a formula (def:wff-pred) with no free variables, formalized as FV(phi) = empty, which rests directly on def:fv. Same fix as the parallel sentence node def:sentence-predicate-logic (0020), which I set to {def:fv, def:wff-pred}.
notes: DUPLICATE FLAG: def:sentence (this node, 'Sentence/closed formula', defined via FV=empty) and def:sentence-predicate-logic (0020, 'Sentence', glossed semantically as 'truth values without an assignment') are two Sentence nodes -- dedup candidate. 'FV(phi) = empty-set' also points at def:empty-set, a candidate edge left unproposed (the emptiness is the predicate, not a constructed object).
